content: An ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agent can use Transformer attention gating to dynamically prioritize high-surprise episodic memories, expanding its effective working memory capacity for active learning by only retaining and recalling context that supports continued curiosity-driven exploration, rather than filling working memory with redundant, low-information experience traces.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
trigger_topic: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
